seoTitle: Henderson County Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View Henderson County Public Schools NC calendar 2025-2026. Find first day of school, holidays, winter break, spring break, PDF and downloadable calendar files.
calendarNotes: Henderson County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 Traditional/HCEC school year on August 11, 2025 and ends on May 22, 2026 with early dismissal. Winter Break runs December 22-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The revised calendar also lists optional and required teacher workdays, annual leave, inclement-weather days, holidays, and a 12:00 noon early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Henderson County Public Schools start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Henderson County Public Schools Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Henderson County Public Schools in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 22, 2026, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the 2025-2026 HCPS calendar include Early College?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The reviewed PDF is labeled as the Traditional and Early College calendar.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 11, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 22, 2026.
